title: Positive flow: Sign Up
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the sign-up/login screen
test_steps: Click on the 'Kaydol' (Sign Up) button | Enter a valid email address in the email input field | Enter a valid password in the password input field | Click on the 'Kaydol' (Sign Up) button again to submit the form
expected_result: The user is successfully registered and redirected to the login screen

title: Positive flow: Log In
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the sign-up/login screen
test_steps: Click on the 'Oturum aç' (Log In) button | Enter a valid email address in the email input field | Enter a valid password in the password input field | Click on the 'Oturum aç' (Log In) button again to submit the form
expected_result: The user is successfully logged in and redirected to the main content screen

title: Negative flow: Invalid Email
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the sign-up/login screen
test_steps: Click on the 'Kaydol' (Sign Up) button | Enter an invalid email address in the email input field | Enter a valid password in the password input field | Click on the 'Kaydol' (Sign Up) button again to submit the form
expected_result: The app displays an error message indicating an invalid email address

title: Negative flow: Invalid Password
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the sign-up/login screen
test_steps: Click on the 'Oturum aç' (Log In) button | Enter a valid email address in the email input field | Enter an invalid password in the password input field | Click on the 'Oturum aç' (Log In) button again to submit the form
expected_result: The app displays an error message indicating an invalid password

title: Negative flow: Empty Email
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the sign-up/login screen
test_steps: Click on the 'Kaydol' (Sign Up) button | Enter an empty email address in the email input field | Enter a valid password in the password input field | Click on the 'Kaydol' (Sign Up) button again to submit the form
expected_result: The app displays an error message indicating an empty email address

title: Negative flow: Empty Password
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the sign-up/login screen
test_steps: Click on the 'Oturum aç' (Log In) button | Enter a valid email address in the email input field | Enter an empty password in the password input field | Click on the 'Oturum aç' (Log In) button again to submit the form
expected_result: The app displays an error message indicating an empty password
